tasks.goal: Research and define the canonical bilingual (EN/KR) terminology, naming conventions, and casing rules for the payments platform API.

outputs.description: A JSON mapping of canonical English terms to Korean translations and their specific usage contexts.
A JSON object defining rules for endpoint nouns, error-code vocabulary structure, and casing standards (e.g., snake_case vs camelCase).

tasks.goal: Develop the worked integration tutorial with code samples, strictly adhering to the terminology and conventions defined in Part A.

outputs.description: A Markdown document containing the step-by-step integration guide, code snippets, and explanations using the canonical terms.

tasks.goal: Assemble the final bilingual API style guide by combining the terminology definitions and the integration tutorial into a single deliverable.

outputs.description: The final comprehensive Markdown document containing both Part A (Terminology/Conventions) and Part B (Tutorial).
